name: 3 Wick 15oz Ceramic Black Honey Vanilla Jar Candle - Threshold™
description:
Lift your spirits with the refreshing, pleasant fragrance of the 15oz Ceramic Jar 3-Wick Black Honey Vanilla Candle Plum Purple from Threshold™. This candle infuses your home with honey and vanilla scents that creates an inviting ambience you’re sure to appreciate. While the gentle light flickers and sends shadows across the walls, the ceramic exterior add to the overall vibe. Easy to display on a mantel or a side table, this Threshold™ black honey vanilla candle is a must-have essential you’ll want to keep handy.

Casual classics for house and home.
